sentences.text: We had a beautiful and inexpensive hotel room in the Latin Quarter.
We had a balcony with a wonderful view.
We visited many famous tourist places.
The Louvre, a well-known museum, was my favorite.
The museum is so huge, you could spend weeks there.
We took lots of breaks and sat in cafes along the River Seine.
The French food we ate was delicious.
The wines were tasty too.
What Anna enjoyed the most was the food.
What Anna enjoyed most during the vacation was the breakfast in the hotel.
She said she would be happy if she could eat croissants like those every day.
We had so much fun that we're already talking about our next vacation.
My friend Anna and I just returned from the greatest summer vacation ever.
We spent eight days in Paris, France.
After researching many hotels, we decided on one from TripAdvisor, a travel website.
We booked a beautiful and inexpensive hotel,
and we went to the hotel room in the Latin Quarter.
We had a balcony with a wonderful view.
We visited many famous tourist places.
The Louvre, a well-known museum, was my favorite.
The museum is so huge, you could spend weeks there.
We took lots of breaks and sat in cafes along the River Seine.
The French food we ate was delicious.
The wines were tasty too.
What Anna enjoyed most during the vacation was...
the breakfast in the hotel.
She said she would be happy if she could eat croissants like those every day.
We had so much fun that we're already talking about our next vacation.
Text 2.
Celebrated on February 14th,
Valentine's Day has become a significant cultural, religious, and commercial celebration of romance and love in many parts of the world.
In the United States, most Americans spend the holiday with their loved ones.
In the United States, most Americans spend the holiday with their loved ones.
Exchange of chocolates, flowers, and gifts, as well as accompanying greeting cards,
are the most essential components of Valentine's Day.
Valentine's Day is often associated with red and pink colors.
Many individuals, instead of celebrating romantically,
spend the holiday with their friends and family members.
Although Valentine's Day in America
is recognized by the vast majority of the population,
it isn't a public holiday.
means that offices, stores, schools, and other organizations are open as usual
and public transport run on their usual schedules on this day.

Text 3
In the United States, a 16-year-old person can work,
get a driver's license, and live away from their parents.
Many high school students learn to drive and get part-time jobs
soon after they've had their 16th birthday.
At the age of 18,
people in the U.S. and other countries
are allowed to join the Army and vote in elections,
but they are not allowed to go to nightclubs,
buy wine or cigarettes until they are 21.
One of the most significant cities in the U.S. is New York.
Every day, thousands of airplanes land
in John F. Kennedy International Airport in New York,
bringing tens of thousands of tourists.
They love to see the skyscrapers there.
One of them is Central Park Tower,
which is the second-largest skyscraper in the U.S.
It's the second-tallest building in New York,
attracting millions of visitors.
People also go to New York to see the Statue of Liberty,
which is considered the most attractive site of the city.
It is common for American families to visit it
with their children when they are still very young.

Text 4.
Scientists are concerned by the fact
that increasing numbers of people in the world
are becoming dependent on computer games.
But the media thinks differently.
They emphasize the positive side of computer games,
such as how entertaining they are.
Unfortunately, recent studies found that about 6% of users
spend hours of their time sitting at their computers
or playing video games non-stop for the whole weekend.
Sooner or later, this becomes bad for their personal lives and health.
Though journalists believe that computer games are a good thing,
they are not.
While some believe that computer games can help people develop skills
such as concentration and problem solving,
others are certain that a person who cannot stop playing computer games
is very similar to a drug user.
When a person becomes dependent on computer games,
then he needs some kind of help.
In some cases, the addicted player can break the dependence
by stopping playing computer games immediately.
In the worst cases,
they need to be taken to a special clinic for a period of time.
This is the most common case.
The most common case is that a person who is addicted to computer games
is addicted to computer games.

Text 5
Villaroy & Bach is a German manufacturer of ceramics.
The company has been in the Georgian market for 10 years.
On the 10th anniversary of the company,
the Georgian representation of Villaroy & Bach
decided to produce some unusual products.
In particular, the company made a new product,
a new manufactured products decorated with the masterpieces
by well-known Georgian contemporary artist,
Rusudan Petvyashvili.
The limited number of Villaroy & Bach products
painted by the Georgian artist is called
Love and Harmony in Relationship.
Nicholas Villaroy, one of the leaders of the company,
was impressed with the colors and painting technique of the artist.
The artist stated that Villaroy & Bach was her favorite brand,
but she could never ever think of such a collaboration.
The project turned out to be a big success,
so who knows, perhaps the brand will start to manufacture products
decorated by Rusudan Petvyashvili's artworks in larger quantities.
Rusudan Petvyashvili creates paintings using unique technique.
The entire piece is performed in one touch.

I love New York.
I've loved this city since I was a little girl.
And now that I've called it home for eight years,
I can honestly say that I still love living here.
You might ask, what do you love about it?
Well, there are probably at least 100 reasons
to love living in New York City.
And for me, to make a complete list, I'd need a few days.
With over 8 million residents,
New York has something for everyone.
New York is often called the capital city of the world.
And it certainly feels that way.
But in the center of this exciting, noisy, polluted city,
there is a place to find peace and quiet.
This place is Central Park.
It is my favorite place in the city,
where I always take my friends when they come visit me.
Central Park is the green heart of New York.

to get away from the busy city.

as well as exotic birds
that pass through during their migration.
You can also run, swim, climb,
or simply sit and read a book
in the huge park's different places.
Although it looks completely natural,
the park is man-made,
created over 160 years ago.
Frederick Law Olmsted and Calvert Vaux
designed the park in the center of New York
at a time when the city was very crowded
and unhealthy place to live.
They wanted to make a place
where people of all backgrounds,
rich and poor,
could find fresh air in the dirty city.
It does the same job today.

life in New York would be impossible
without Central Park.

without visiting the area of the park

the British rock musician

In the center of Strawberry Fields,

which contains a single word.
The title of one of Lennon's
most famous songs, Imagine.
There, on the Imagine mosaic,
you can often find flowers and strawberries,
guitars and handwritten notes
from Lennon's fans.

they're really just talking about
the island of Manhattan,

Manhattan,

Queens,

at any time of the day,
I prefer heading westward
from Brooklyn to Manhattan
as the sun begins to set,
over the Manhattan skyline.

no trip to New York City is complete

So, as you see, New York offers endless variety,
and that's the beauty of living here.
